name: blog_entry
schema:
CREATE TABLE "blog_entry" (
   "id" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
   "created" TEXT,
   "slug" TEXT,
   "metadata" TEXT,
   "card_image" TEXT,
   "is_draft" INTEGER,
   "title" TEXT,
   "body" TEXT,
   "tweet_html" TEXT,
   "extra_head_html" TEXT,
   "custom_template" TEXT,
   "live_timezone" TEXT,
   "series_id" TEXT REFERENCES "blog_series"("id")
)
